query: My PR's checks are green and it's approved. Give me the command to merge it and clean up the branch. Our commits are signed.
expected_behavior: Explains that a rebase merge strips/loses commit signatures on the default branch (squash commits are web-flow-signed -> Verified)
Notes the before-merge obligation: triage any automated PR review comments (Copilot etc.) first
anti_behavior: Says merge method doesn't matter for signed commits
source: SOURCE CODE MANAGEMENT — squash not rebase (v2.11) + triage reviews (v5.6)
